title: Frontend Developer
description: Build and maintain user interfaces for web applications.

title: Backend Developer
description: Develop APIs and server-side logic for scalable applications.

title: UI Designer
description: Design clean and user-friendly interfaces for modern web platforms.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Work across both frontend and backend systems to deliver full web features.

title: Software Engineer
description: Build software solutions, debug issues, and improve application performance.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Maintain deployment pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and system reliability.

title: QA Tester
description: Test software features, report bugs, and verify fixes before release.

title: Product Manager
description: Coordinate teams, define product goals, and guide features from idea to launch.

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze business data, create reports, and support decision-making with insights.

title: Mobile App Developer
description: Develop and maintain mobile applications for Android and iOS platforms.
